name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new idea or improvement
title: '[Feature]: '

---

## 🚀 Feature Description

Describe the feature you would like to see.

## 🎯 Problem it Solves

Explain what problem this feature solves.

## 💡 Proposed Solution

Describe how you think it should work.

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered

Other solutions or workarounds you've thought about.

## 📌 Additional Context

Add mockups, examples, or references.
